DRG_OUTLIER_AMT 
LABEL: 
DRG Outlier Additional Payment Amount 
DESCRIPTION: The additional payment on a claim that is associated with either a cost outlier or length of stay outlier. 
SHORT NAME: DRG_OUTLIER_AMT 
LONG NAME: DRG_OUTLIER_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 
FILE(S): 
IP header 
VALUES: 
Dollar amount with two decimal places (e.g.,
